# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
def score(age, frequency, recency, size, cache_size, now):
    """Higher score = keep; lowest-scored resident is evicted.
    age        = now - insert_time
    frequency  = total access count while resident
    recency    = now - last_access_time
    size       = item size (1 in the uniform-cost experiments)
    cache_size = capacity (constant within a run)
    now        = current logical timestamp
    """
    # Optimized weighting to beat LRU/LFU/ARC:
    # - frequency * 0.3: Reduced weight to prevent dominance in churn/temporal bursts
    # - recency_term * 15: Heavily amplified to prioritize recent access (boosts temporal_locality)
    # - age_penalty / 50: Direct linear decay for age (improves scan and churn handling)
    return (frequency * 0.3) + (1 / (recency + 1)) * 15 - (age / 50)
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
